Welcome

Your Home in Halkidiki

Nestled in the serene village of Kriopigi, our thoughtfully designed two-bedroom apartment blends modern comfort with the timeless charm of Halkidiki. Wake to the gentle rustle of lemon trees in the garden, enjoy your morning coffee on the sun-drenched terrace, and spend your days exploring golden beaches just moments away.

Whether you’re seeking a romantic escape, a family retreat, or a quiet place to work remotely, every detail has been considered — so you can simply relax and enjoy.

Information

FAQ & House Rules

Check-in is from 15:00 and check-out is by 11:00. Early check-in or late check-out may be possible depending on availability — just ask when you book.
The nearest beach is approximately 1.5 km away — a pleasant 15-minute walk or a quick 2-minute drive. Free parking is available at the apartment.
Absolutely. The apartment is very family-friendly, with a safe garden area for children, a fully equipped kitchen, and a calm residential neighbourhood. The second bedroom has two single beds, ideal for children.
Yes. We offer fast and reliable Wi-Fi suitable for video calls, streaming, and all remote work needs. Many guests choose our apartment specifically because the connection is dependable.
Yes, we are pet-friendly. Well-behaved dogs and cats are welcome. The garden provides a nice outdoor space for pets. Please let us know when booking.
Yes, free private parking is available on-site. We also offer an EV charging station for electric vehicles. Let us know in advance so we can have everything ready.
We welcome and encourage direct bookings through our contact form, WhatsApp, or email. Direct bookings often come with better rates since there are no platform fees. We are also on Booking.com and Airbnb.

Find Us

Our Location

Kriopigi, Kassandra, Halkidiki — 1.5 km from the beach, 85 km from Thessaloniki Airport.
